summary: Completed focused regression testing of backend path-traversal hardening fix. All 33 tests passed (100% success rate). The backend correctly blocks all path traversal attempts that reach the API with 404 responses. No regressions detected - all endpoints and functionality working as expected.
passed_tests: Path Traversal Protection: All URL-encoded traversal attempts correctly blocked with 404 (..%2f..%2fetc%2fpasswd, ..%2F..%2Fetc%2Fpasswd, ..%5c..%5cwindows, double-encoded)
Path Traversal Protection: All filenames containing '..' correctly blocked with 404 (..docker-compose.yml, docker..compose.yml, docker-compose.yml.., test..file)
Path Traversal Protection: All absolute paths correctly blocked with 404 (/etc/passwd, /app/deliverables/docker-compose.yml)
Path Traversal Protection: All subdirectory attempts correctly blocked with 404 (subdir/file, subdir\file)
Path Traversal Protection: Whitespace filenames correctly blocked with 404
No Regression: All 6 valid files still accessible (docker-compose.yml, .env.example, init.sh, README.md, .gitignore, validate_stack.py)

No Regression: docker-compose.yml contains all critical fixes (group_add ${DOCKER_GID, host.docker.internal:host-gateway, WORKSPACE_MOUNT_PATH, /var/run/docker.sock, ports 5000:3000 & 5001:8787, no version: key)
No Regression: GET /api/files returns 6 files with metadata
No Regression: GET /api/validate returns 18/18 passing checks (0 failed)
No Regression: GET /api/overview returns 2 services (OpenHands, Headroom) + 2 fixes (socket, dind)
No Regression: GET /api/download-all returns valid zip with 6 files
No Regression: GET /api/files/{name}/download returns attachment with correct headers
Client-side URL normalization: Patterns like ../../../etc/passwd are normalized by HTTP client and hit SPA fallback (HTML), not the API - this is expected behavior and NOT a security issue

success_percentage.frontend: Not tested (backend-only regression test as requested)
